message.content:
## 역할 Next.js 15 App Router 프로젝트에서 Word 관리 페이지 UI를 구현하는 구현자 에이전트. ## 프로젝트 위치 D:\20. POC\TrmWordDict2 ## 현재 상태 - `app/(admin)/word/page.tsx`: `
JSON.stringify
` 플레이스홀더 상태 - `features/word/queries.ts`: searchWords 구현됨 (keyword/domainId 복합검색, domain relation include) - `features/word/actions.ts`: 읽어서 확인할 것 - `features/word/schema.ts`: wordSearchSchema, wordSaveSchema 정의됨 ### features/word/schema.ts 내용 ```ts export const wordSearchSchema = z.object({ keyword: z.string().optional(), domainId: z.coerce.number().optional(), page: z.coerce.number().default(0), size: z.coerce.number().default(20), }) export const wordSaveSchema = z.object({ wordKor: z.string().min(1).max(100), wordEng: z.string().min(1).max(100), wordAbbr: z.string().max(50).optional(), domainId: z.number().optional(), }) ``` ### features/word/queries.ts 내용 searchWords는 domain relation include하여 `{ domain: { code, name } }` 반환. ## 공통 컴포넌트 (이미 존재) - `components/ui/data-table.tsx`: DataTable (columnDefs, rowData, onRowClick, loading, height) - `components/ui/search-form.tsx`: SearchForm (children, onSearch, onReset) - `components/ui/page-header.tsx`: PageHeader (title, description?, action?) ## Domain 모듈 패턴 참고 (이미 완성됨) Domain 모듈이 완성된 패턴을 따름. 읽어서 패턴 파악: - `features/domain/actions.ts` — try/catch 패턴 참고 - `features/domain/components/DomainTable.tsx` — DataTable 사용 패턴 참고 - `features/domain/components/DomainForm.tsx` — react-hook-form + Dialog 패턴 참고 - `features/domain/components/DomainDetailPanel.tsx` — 상세 패널 패턴 참고 - `features/domain/components/DomainSearchForm.tsx` — 검색폼 패턴 참고 - `app/(admin)/domain/page.tsx` — 페이지 구성 패턴 참고 ## 구현할 파일들 ### 1. `features/word/actions.ts` 수정 기존 파일 읽기 후 Prisma 호출에 try/catch 추가 + revalidatePath('/word') 추가. - word 모듈이므로 revalidatePath('/word') ### 2. `features/word/components/WordSearchForm.tsx` (신규) - keyword input (placeholder: "한글명, 영문명, 약어 검색") - domainId select (Domain 목록에서 선택) — **단, Domain 목록 fetch는 Server Component에서 처리하므로, 이 컴포넌트는 `domains: {id: number, code: string, name: string}[]` prop을 받아서 select 옵션으로 표시** - SearchForm 래핑 - URL 파라미터로 router.push ### 3. `features/word/components/WordForm.tsx` (신규) - Dialog + react-hook-form + zodResolver(wordSaveSchema) - 필드: wordKor(한글명), wordEng(영문명), wordAbbr(약어, 선택), domainId(도메인 select, 선택) - domains prop 받아서 select 옵션 표시 - createWord 또는 updateWord 호출 후 router.refresh() + onSuccess() ### 4. `features/word/components/WordDetailPanel.tsx` (신규) - Dialog로 상세 표시 - 필드: id, wordKor, wordEng, wordAbbr, domain(code+name), createdAt - 수정 버튼 → WordForm(수정 모드) - 삭제 버튼 → deleteWord 호출 (try/catch/finally) - router.refresh() 호출 ### 5. `features/word/components/WordTable.tsx` (신규) - DataTable 사용 - 컬럼: wordKor(한글명), wordEng(영문명), wordAbbr(약어), domain.name(도메인), createdAt - 행 클릭 → WordDetailPanel - "새 단어" 버튼 → WordForm Word 타입 (queries.ts의 include에서 유추): ```ts type WordItem = { id: number wordKor: string wordEng: string wordAbbr: string | null domainId: number | null domain: { code: string; name: string } | null createdAt: Date } ``` ### 6. `app/(admin)/word/page.tsx` 교체 ```tsx // Server Component // 1. getDomains({ page: 0, size: 999 }) 호출해서 도메인 목록 가져오기 (select 옵션용) // 2. searchWords(params) 호출 // 3. PageHeader + WordSearchForm(domains) + WordTable(items, domains) 렌더 ``` ## 완료 기준 1. 6개 파일 생성/수정 완료 2. npx tsc --noEmit 실행 후 신규 파일 타입 오류 없음 완료 후 파일 목록 보고.

- understand-anything:understand
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init
- review
- security-review
